title: Workers Binding API
excerpt: description: Query D1 databases from a Cloudflare Worker using the D1 Binding API for prepared statements, batching, and type-safe results. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/d1/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. You can execute SQL queries on your D1 database from a Worker using the Worker Binding API. To do this, you can perform the following steps: 1. [Bind the D1 Database](https://developers.cloudflare.com/d1/get-started/#3-bind-your-worker-to-your-d1-database).
